replies.author: @gyromurphy
replies.text: ​@WarrenSmithAussie  no no no... you gotta watch other videos. He's literally one of the best. As far as movie good reviewers, its Critical Drinker, Mauler (if you want to watch reviews longer than the movies themselves... but still wildly entertaining) Cinema Snob, who has covered some of the most obscure movies, and then Cinemassacre, otherwise know as the Angry Video Game Nerd,  who is essentially the Godfather of YouTube video game and Movie reviews. His Monster Madness series has been a mainstay in my household since like 2010. But Drinker is the best for concise movie reviews.  Just check out his other videos and youll see he was just messing around this video... playing the part of Chris Stuckmann and how his milk toast reviews usually go

replies.author: @gyromurphy
replies.text: ​@HtracChris Stuckmann. He's a movie reviewer who made a movie... this one Drinker is reviewing. His catch phrase is "and you can get Stuckmannized" or something like that. I havent watched one of his videos in like 7 or 8 years... so I may have gotten that wrong. ... he's a milk toast reviewer.  Safe for YouTube type. While he's not straight up terrible... he's definitely a closer to what RLM's Nerd Crew series portrays than he is to Drinker. Like that New Rockstars channel. They're 100% studio paid. And I wouldn't doubt Stuckmann has been at some point as well

He changed the title of his House of the Dragon video on his second channel, it originally said no one cared about the show because of Game of Thrones’ bad reputation, but then he quietly turned it into an “analysis” video (even though the old title is still visible in the video). He’s also been dishonest about The Boys, admitting he hadn’t watched the season yet still using Rotten Tomatoes audience scores as his “source.” He sort of overrated Thunderbolts too, calling Yelena as a discount Black Widow, even though in his Black Widow video, he really liked Yelena

author: @efe_aydal
text:
Mr Drinker, I just realized u finished ur short film "Rogue elements". As a filmmaker shooting his second feature film (and countless short films/docs), when I saw it, all I said was "good, so he managed to make it". It never occured to me that people would actually shit on it. I just wanted to write this comment as support. When u make ur first films, and if u're a polarizing person, people will try to find an excuse to attack it. I know u didn't like the end product either, but u handled the situation correctly. If u asked me to, I could dismantle the film scene by scene and tell what didn't work. And I actually thought of writing it as a constructive criticism. But when I saw woke channels with hundreds of thousands of views literally attacking ur film, I said screw it. Every point they try to make shows they're just attacking out of spite.

* U never claimed u could make a much better film. U know u can't cause u didn't have the funds or the experience
* U never attacked the audience for not liking it
* U never ripped apart any low budget  productions. If u did, ur haters would have a point
* They kept comparing ur films to 100M dollar productions made by seasoned producers
* In those videos attacking the films, people kept refering u as right wing conservative. So that alone shows where they come from.
Anyway I just wanted to give support from one filmmaker to another. Hope u keep making more.
